positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical celestial floral wreath framing a central, majestic crescent moon. The design features intertwining bioluminescent foliage, stylized glowing mushrooms, and cosmic dust rendered in deep indigo, sapphire blue, vibrant cyan, and gold leaf accents. The composition must have clean, bold silhouettes, strong negative space contrast, and a symmetrical, repeating pattern suitable for apparel printing. Studio quality vector illustration, flat graphic design style, intricate linework, golden ratio composition, maximalist yet balanced.
